category_sources: Official cr.yp.to page says daemontools is a collection of tools for managing UNIX services.
source_facts.description says daemontools is a collection of tools for managing UNIX services.
display_name_sources: Official cr.yp.to page heading identifies the project as daemontools.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official daemontools page and links to installation, FAQ, and per-command documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official cr.yp.to page provides release archives and documentation, but no official source-control repository was identified.
tags_sources: Official cr.yp.to page documents supervise, svscan, svc, multilog, and related service/logging tools.
source_facts.description says it manages UNIX services.
